title: Income Tax Department Announces Upcoming Due Dates for TCS Certificates and Challan-cum-Statement on May 29, 2026 (Updated May 27, 2026)
content:
# Income Tax Department Announces Upcoming Due Dates for TCS Certificates and Challan-cum-Statement on May 29, 2026 (Updated May 27, 2026)

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department ne TCS Certificates aur Challan-cum-Statement filings ke liye upcoming due dates remind kiye hain. Taxpayers ko in deadlines ko timely meet karna zaroori hai.

*   **TCS Certificates (Form 27D) Issuance:** Financial Year 2025-26 ke fourth quarter (Q4) ke liye TCS certificates issue karne ki last date **May 30, 2026** hai.
*   **Challan-cum-Statement Filing:** Income-tax Act, 2025 ke Section 393(1) ke under challan-cum-statement of tax deduction file karne ki last date bhi **May 30, 2026** hai.

Yeh deadlines compliance ke liye critical hain, aur late filings se penalties lag sakti hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/notifications)

*Published on: 27 May 2026*
